title: astragalus onobrychis subsp. onobrychioides
intro: Astragalus onobrychis subsp. onobrychioides, also known as onobrychis astragalus, is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae), commonly found in Central Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus onobrychis subsp. onobrychioides include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Astragalus onobrychis subsp. onobrychioides can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
